BOLANOS; CLERK: YOLANDA MAZARIEGOS; PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (504)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KISTNER, JENNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JENSEN, DAO $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,650.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN MARCH 30, 2016, AT PLAINTIFF'S DEMAND AND COST, TURN OVER TO PLAINTIFF THE FOLLOWING ITEMS OF FURNITURE: QUEEN BOX SPRING, MATTRESS, AND BED FRAME; PUB TABLE WITH THREE CHAIRS; DRESSER AND HUTCH. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-20-16 At 10:10 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for trial de novo (Appeal on Defendant's Claim only).
Dept. 504, Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings not reported.

Jason Hain, Esq., appearing for Appellant/Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant Jenna Kistner. Appellant/Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant Jenna Kistner is not present this day.

Respondent/Defendant/Cross-Complainant Dao Jensen appearing on her own behalf.
Dao Jensen is sworn and examined on her own behalf.

After oral evidence is introduced by the respective parties, the Court ordered the Judgment entered on February 11, 2016 on Defendant's Claim vacated. Court will issue a Judgment.

No Documentary Evidence was introduced at this hearing.

Court adjourned.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-13-2016 Continued To Jun-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
